title: Panama Choclo Virus Outbreak: International Response Teams Deployed to Los Santos Province
excerpt: WHO and PAHO have mobilized field response teams following a rapid escalation of confirmed Choclo hantavirus cases in Panama's Los Santos province, with a case fatality rate exceeding 60%.

title: Patagonia Andes Virus Cluster Grows: Argentina Reports 847 Confirmed Cases in Escalating Outbreak

title: Germany Records Highest Puumala Virus Case Count in a Decade: Baden-Württemberg Under Surveillance
excerpt: A dramatic rise in bank vole populations following mild winters is driving an unprecedented HFRS wave across southern Germany. Experts note the low CFR despite high transmission.
